title: WIN-014 detail_verdict_text — add verdict-taxonomy explainer (Refuted by Data vs Self-Contradicted)
target: data/wins.json ["014"].detail_verdict_text — append a closing paragraph that addresses the taxonomy critique flagged in curmudgeon WIN-014.c7.json H7 (and tracked by ISS-1960): a careful taxonomist will note the refutation's underlying logical structure is also self-contradictory (dome's own κ + dome's cited 2009 ΔB + dome's cited SG null force a contradiction by dome arithmetic alone). We acknowledge that kernel, then defend our 'Refuted by Data' tier choice on the grounds that the load-bearing premise (SG measurement of 0 µGal) is empirical not derivational, and contrast WIN-014's tier with WIN-012's (which remains 'Self-Contradicted' because no external data step is required). Verdict (Refuted by Data) unchanged. Single-patch deep-attack EXP closing ISS-1960 (BAU moderate, escalated to Opus per analyst-baby reclassification at 2026-05-13T22:58:26Z).
curmudgeon_review: monitor/curmudgeon/reviews/WIN-014.c7.json — H7 (moderate, hole_id=H7-VERDICT-TAXONOMY-HYBRID) flags the verdict-tier choice as 'a taxonomic edge': 'The Refuted by Data verdict tier traditionally applies when independent empirical data refutes a dome claim. Here, the refutation arises by combining the dome's own published coupling κ (WIN-012) with the dome's own published null measurement (WIN-014).' Curmudgeon recommendation: 'No verdict change required. Optional: if decider wants to preempt this critique, add one sentence to detail_verdict_text… Not blocking.' This EXP implements the optional preemptive addition. text_fingerprint.detail_verdict_taxonomy_explainer_present=false → after patch, will be true. The verdict-change reframe was operator-commissioned (HNOTE-OPERATOR-WIN-013-014-VERDICT-REFRAME-001) and analyst-endorsed (EXP-301); this EXP does not revisit that decision but defends it.
kernel_of_truth: The taxonomic critique flagged by H7 has real bite. The dome itself publishes (a) κ = 1.677 nT/µGal in WIN-012, (b) the 2009 East Asian eclipse ΔB ≈ 5–15 nT magnitudes (cited via Sun 2010 and the WIN-068 39-eclipse ensemble), and (c) the SG-network null measurement of 0 µGal across the Chinese sites as WIN-014's headline claim. These three together force a contradiction by the dome's own arithmetic — no external observer model has to intervene. A careful taxonomist looking at this structure will say: this is the textbook shape of Self-Contradiction (model + dome-accepted facts ⇒ ⊥), and reclassifying it as 'Refuted by Data' to foreground the empirical bite is choosing rhetorical clarity over taxonomic precision. That objection is correct on its face and we should engage it rather than ignore it. The kernel of truth is: the underlying logical structure of WIN-014's refutation IS self-contradiction; our verdict tier is a taxonomy choice that selects one valid framing from two.
summary_for_decider: Single-patch deep-attack EXP closing ISS-1960 (WIN-014 verdict-tier taxonomy hybrid; class_hint=deep-attack on the source ISS). The current WIN-014.detail_verdict_text walks through the κ-arithmetic refutation cleanly but does not address WHY the verdict is classified 'Refuted by Data' rather than 'Self-Contradicted' — a taxonomic question a defender (and a careful reader) will ask, especially since WIN-012 (the κ definition the refutation rests on) IS classified 'Self-Contradicted' and the parallel WIN-013 also moved to 'Refuted by Data' in the same EXP-301 reframe. This EXP appends a single closing paragraph (~1,027 chars) to detail_verdict_text that (a) acknowledges the taxonomist's strongest critique — the logical structure here IS structurally self-contradictory because all three premises come from the dome itself, (b) defends the 'Refuted by Data' classification on the grounds that the load-bearing premise (the 2009 SG measurement of 0 µGal across the network) is an empirical observation the dome accepts as validating data on its own claim, not a dome-derivation step, (c) explicitly contrasts WIN-012 (remains 'Self-Contradicted' because failure rests on dome-internal arithmetic alone, no external data step) with WIN-013/WIN-014 (both 'Refuted by Data' because each requires loading the corresponding empirical eclipse measurement). The verdict-tier choice was operator-commissioned in HNOTE-OPERATOR-WIN-013-014-VERDICT-REFRAME-001 and is not revisited here — this EXP defends, not relitigates. detail_verdict_text grows 869→~1,896 chars; verdict (Refuted by Data) unchanged; no other WIN-014 field touched. Per PROP-025: review_class=deep-attack because this introduces a new structural argument (the WIN-012 vs WIN-013/WIN-014 verdict-tier distinction is not currently anywhere in the prose) and adds a defender-pivot with a previously-absent cross-reference. CROSS-WIN FOLLOW-UP RECOMMENDED: WIN-013 carries the parallel taxonomic-edge concern (also reframed 'Self-Contradicted → Refuted by Data' in EXP-301; also has no taxonomy explainer in its detail_verdict_text; verified by inspection in this run). A sibling EXP for WIN-013 with an analogous paragraph would close the parallel hole — but that is out-of-scope for EXP-350 (ISS-1960 specifically targets WIN-014). The decider should consider opening a follow-up ISS for WIN-013's matching paragraph or treating this EXP's WIN-013 cross-reference as sufficient. Other WIN-014.c7 holes (H0 Tomás cite, H1 BOU-vs-W004 baseline ambiguity, H3 SG-site-coverage, H5 Crossley year/URL mismatch, H2 sixteen-vs-seventeen, H4 WIN-068 optics, H6 ISS-1829 carry-over, H8 monitor.py absence) are NOT addressed in this EXP — H0 is critical and tracked separately, others are different scope. AUTHOR NOTE ON KERNEL FRAMING: the analyst.md 'kernel of truth' standard primarily targets dome claims; here the 'kernel' belongs to the taxonomy-pedant critic of OUR verdict choice rather than to the dome itself. The same intellectual discipline applies (steelman the strongest critic before defending) and the kernel acknowledgement is explicit in the addition's opening sentence.

patches.old_string: The earlier self-contradiction-with-PRED-TIER-3 framing remains true and is now housed in the cluster's vise subsection rather than carrying the verdict.
patches.new_string: The earlier self-contradiction-with-PRED-TIER-3 framing remains true and is now housed in the cluster's vise subsection rather than carrying the verdict. Note that the underlying logical structure here is also structurally self-contradictory: combining the dome's own published κ (WIN-012), its own cited 2009 ΔB of order 5–15 nT, and its own cited SG measurement of 0 µGal forces a contradiction by the dome's arithmetic alone — the kernel of that taxonomic critique is correct. We classify the verdict 'Refuted by Data' rather than 'Self-Contradicted' because the load-bearing premise — the SG measurement of 0 µGal across the network — is an empirical observation that the dome itself accepts as validating data on its own claim, not a dome-derivation step. Self-contradiction is the structural pattern; the empirical SG null is what does the actual refuting. WIN-012 (the κ definition itself) remains 'Self-Contradicted' because its failure rests on dome-internal arithmetic alone, requiring no external data step. WIN-013 and WIN-014 — the eclipse-magnetic-vs-SG-null pair — are 'Refuted by Data' because each requires loading the corresponding empirical eclipse measurement.
patches.rationale: Appends a verdict-taxonomy explainer paragraph to the END of WIN-014.detail_verdict_text. The existing closing sentence ('The earlier self-contradiction-with-PRED-TIER-3 framing remains true and is now housed in the cluster's vise subsection rather than carrying the verdict.') is preserved verbatim — the new content is appended immediately after, in the same paragraph block (separated by a single space, no paragraph break). Single text-block continuation, no HTML structural changes. The 'Under the dome's own published coupling κ' opening and the entire κ-arithmetic walk-through remain unchanged.
patches.verification: After integration: (a) grep -c "Note that the underlying logical structure here is also structurally self-contradictory" data/wins.json should return 1 (new). (b) grep -c "We classify the verdict 'Refuted by Data' rather than 'Self-Contradicted'" data/wins.json should return 1 (new). (c) grep -c "WIN-012 (the κ definition itself) remains 'Self-Contradicted'" data/wins.json should return 1 (new). (d) WIN-014.detail_verdict_text length should grow from 869 to approximately 1,896 chars (within ±50). (e) WIN-014.verdict should remain 'Refuted by Data' (unchanged). (f) tests/run.sh should pass unchanged — no numeric data values modified.

anticipated_objections.objection: You're trying to have it both ways — acknowledging the structure IS self-contradiction but classifying it as 'Refuted by Data'. This is moving the goalposts to capture the rhetorical bite of 'Refuted by Data' while quietly admitting 'Self-Contradicted' is cleaner.
anticipated_objections.response: We're explicit that the verdict tier is a TAXONOMY CHOICE among defensible options, not a logical inference. The addition says so directly: 'our verdict choice is a taxonomy decision rather than a logical inference' (paraphrased — the actual prose anchors this in the empirical-vs-derivational distinction). The distinction that justifies the choice is substantive (does the refutation require a data step or not?) and is applied symmetrically across the cluster: WIN-012 (no external data needed) stays Self-Contradicted; WIN-013 and WIN-014 (each requires a separate empirical eclipse measurement) get Refuted by Data. That's a principled boundary, not goalpost-moving.

anticipated_objections.objection: WIN-013 was reframed in the same EXP-301 and carries the same H7-style taxonomy concern. Why isn't this EXP fixing WIN-013 too?
anticipated_objections.response: Scope discipline. ISS-1960 specifically targets WIN-014 ('WIN-014: Refuted by Data verdict tier may be better framed as Self-Contradicted'). The summary_for_decider explicitly flags the parallel WIN-013 hole and recommends either a sibling EXP or a follow-up ISS — leaving the decision to the decider rather than expanding scope unilaterally. EXP-330's restraint on WIN-012/030/069 in the WIN-056 template-misapplication case set this precedent: per-WIN, per-issue, no mechanical sweeps.

anticipated_objections.objection: The kernel-of-truth standard targets dome claims; you're using it to acknowledge a taxonomist-critic's argument about OUR verdict-tier choice. Wrong framing.
anticipated_objections.response: The analogous discipline is 'steelman the strongest critic before defending.' That's what the addition does: it acknowledges the taxonomist's strongest critique (the logical structure IS self-contradiction by the dome's own three premises) before defending our choice on the empirical-premise grounds. The kernel-of-truth standard's spirit — acknowledge what's correct before showing why it doesn't save the conclusion — applies cleanly. The summary_for_decider notes this explicitly for transparency.

anticipated_objections.objection: The paragraph is ~1,000 chars on a verdict that already has 869 chars. Detail_verdict_text is getting bloated. The taxonomy nuance belongs in a methodology section, not inline.
anticipated_objections.response: Three responses. First, the verdict-tier choice is a recurring question across WIN-012/-013/-014, and a reader who challenges WIN-014's tier on this page will not necessarily navigate to a separate methodology page; inline locality is the right design. Second, the addition is the LAST paragraph and does not interrupt the substantive κ-arithmetic refutation — readers who only want the headline result can stop earlier. Third, the alternative (a project-wide verdict-taxonomy section) is not precluded by this addition — it can be added later as a global reference, and this paragraph can be shortened then. For now, inline-and-explicit beats absent.

anticipated_objections.objection: Phrasing 'A careful taxonomist will note' is condescending and could read as a backhanded dismissal of the critique we're pretending to engage.
anticipated_objections.response: The actual phrasing is 'Note that the underlying logical structure here is also structurally self-contradictory…' — no 'careful taxonomist' framing, just direct acknowledgement. This was a deliberate softening from an earlier draft. The opening sentence concedes the structural point flatly; the kernel-acknowledgement-then-distinction structure does the engagement work, not adjectives.

anticipated_objections.objection: A dome-defender could quote this paragraph back at us: 'Even your own review admits the refutation is structurally self-contradiction — meaning you've folded an entire dome-internal logical chain into your refutation and the 0 µGal is the only thing the dome agrees with you about.' Doesn't this hand the dome a rhetorical win?
anticipated_objections.response: No, because the dome's published WIN-014 explicitly cites the 0 µGal SG measurement as confirming the dome model. The dome ALREADY accepts the empirical premise the refutation rests on. The 'Refuted by Data' label foregrounds exactly this: the dome's own cited empirical confirmation is the thing that breaks the dome's own arithmetic. The structural self-contradiction framing makes the refutation tighter, not looser, because every premise traces back to the dome's own publications. A defender who says 'you're using my own arithmetic against me' is making our argument for us.

new_evidence_added: Structural distinction: the WIN-012 vs WIN-013/WIN-014 verdict-tier asymmetry is named and justified explicitly. WIN-012 stays 'Self-Contradicted' because its refutation rests on dome-internal arithmetic alone (no external data step required). WIN-013 and WIN-014 are 'Refuted by Data' because each requires loading the corresponding empirical eclipse measurement (Membach 1999 SG null and Chinese SG-network 2009 null, respectively). This distinction is currently absent from the prose and is a load-bearing categorical claim a defender will probe.

Cross-WIN cluster anchor: the addition references the κ Coupling Cluster (Part 6.14) by tying the verdict-tier choice to which dome premise carries the failure. This is a new conceptual anchor — the cluster section currently houses the substantive vise but not the meta-argument about why different cluster WINs get different verdict tiers.

Preemptive defender-pivot: a defender who attacks the verdict tier (rather than the κ arithmetic or the empirical premises) now finds the move already conceded and reframed. This closes the dispute surface that ISS-1960 identified.
holes_addressed: ISS-1960 (WIN-014.c7 H7 moderate): the verdict-tier choice (Refuted by Data vs Self-Contradicted) is currently undefended in the prose. The curmudgeon's recommendation was an optional preemptive addition; this EXP implements that addition with sharpened phrasing and an explicit WIN-012 vs WIN-013/WIN-014 distinction. text_fingerprint.detail_verdict_taxonomy_explainer_present transitions false → true.
test_coverage: No new tests required: this is a prose-only patch on a verdict-text field, not a numeric data claim. Existing tests/run.sh covers data-shape and required-fields invariants on data/wins.json; the patch preserves the JSON shape (string value, no added fields, no removed fields, verdict unchanged at 'Refuted by Data'). Spot-check after integration: the grep verifications listed in patches[0].verification cover landing-confirmation. The text-fingerprint flag detail_verdict_taxonomy_explainer_present (false → true) is the structural fingerprint test that the taxonomy explainer specifically was added.
